title: ferray-random: choice only works on 1D arrays — no axis parameter
description:
Goal: 

Acceptance criteria:
- 

NumPy's Generator.choice(a, size, replace, p, axis=0, shuffle=True) can sample rows from a 2D array along a specified axis. ferray-random's choice only accepts Array<T, Ix1>. For ML, sampling batches from a dataset (2D array of examples) is a core operation. The axis parameter and shuffle parameter (NumPy 1.24+) are also missing.
